prompt:
Goal: Create a vintage mythical travel poster for Troy, showing an idealized ancient city as a dream travel destination.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, warm cream border and a large illustrated scene above a typography block. Use a clean mid-century travel-poster style with simplified geometric shapes, soft grain, flat colors, and subtle paper texture.

Scene: A sunlit Bronze Age coastal city in Anatolia, viewed from the shore looking inland. At the bottom of the illustration, show turquoise sea water with two thin white wave lines, then a sandy beach and a straight stone path leading toward a massive fortified city gate. The path is made of irregular reddish paving stones and should create strong central perspective.

Architecture and landscape: The city has pale limestone defensive walls with crenellations, two large front gate towers, and a dark rectangular central entrance. Behind the walls, show a hillside town of terracotta-roofed houses in ochre, clay, cream, and rust tones. Include one classical temple with columns near the upper center and one tall watchtower on the upper right with a red roof and a small flame beacon. In the far background, include soft green rolling hills under a pale blue-to-cream sky. Place a simple round golden sun high above the city.

Foreground details: In front of the gate, include exactly 1 large wooden Trojan horse centered slightly right of the entrance. Include exactly 4 tiny human figures: 2 standing near the horse on the left side, and 2 standing near the horse on the right side. Add a ceremonial line of round shields and spears along the base of the wall; make them decorative and evenly spaced. Include exactly 3 tall dark green cypress trees: 1 on the left foreground and 2 on the right foreground. Add low shrubs and scattered rocks along both sides of the path.

Text content: In the bottom cream typography panel, set the main title as TROY in very large uppercase burnt-orange geometric lettering with wide spacing. Beneath it, add the subtitle ANATOLIA • 1200 BC in small uppercase teal lettering. Add a short gold horizontal divider line. At the bottom, add the italic tagline Explore worlds like these in Visionaria — First Cinematic Imagination App in warm ochre.

Visual style: Elegant retro travel poster, simplified historic fantasy illustration, balanced symmetry, warm Mediterranean palette, soft shadows, no photorealism, no modern objects, no extra logos or watermarks.
